programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: A whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection; a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork, bacon, a stout barbecue sauce and beer mustard; a whole game hen sitting on a beer can.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: Michael takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities; enjoys microbrews, Coney Island dogs, spicy Korean sliders and pulled pork enchiladas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Hong Kong's dim sum to congee to roast goose; street carts, noodle houses and many restaurants in a city with seven million residents.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Soul food classics like fried catfish and hush puppies, BBQ chicken, crunchy fried green tomatoes and refreshingly cool pie.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Spicy stews to cure a hangover; icy buckwheat noodles to beat the heat; sweet beef and spicy fermented cabbage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples some of the best cuisine St. John's, Newfoundland, has to offer; from succulent blue mussels steamed in local beer and creamy cod au gratin to hearty moose stew and savory rabbit pie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Bursting with beauty and culinary icons of near mythical proportion, the Greek island of Santorini is home to tomato fritters, lamb fricassee and natural delicacies like grilled octopus.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China; from creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: Retro sweet treats; French and Vietnamese flavors and traditions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: Shaved ice Hawaiian treat; edgy desserts for adult palates; ice cream sandwiches with fresh, hot, funnel cakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: A look at some of the coolest desserts in the Arizona desert; Fluff It Marshmallows in Gilbert offers cloud-like marshmallows with many flavor possibilities.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: At the Wandering Goose in Seattle, they push the boundaries with treats like chocolate chip cookies with toffee and crispy chicken skin; Stir Crazy Baked Goods in Fort Worth, Texas, offers up an assortment of cookies, pies, scones and even quiches.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.sub-title: The Things We Bake for Love
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer has the bakers pull out all the stops to create breakfast-in-bed muffin towers and decadent chocolate pies.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer tasks the bakers with celebrating their love for the flavors of the world; they create blind date mashup desserts and cheesecakes that feature exotic and international flavors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Host Jesse Palmer springs into the season with a Mother's Day celebration; for the bakers to show Mom how much she means to them, they create bouquets of tulips and rosé-infused desserts before the judges decide who moves on to the finale.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer is throwing a spring baking wedding; the bottom two bakers create doughnut wedding shower favors before the final three create proposal desserts and dream wedding cakes to win the judges' hearts, the championship title, and $25,000.

programme.desc: Hickory-smoked baby back ribs with hot, Memphis-style barbecue sauce; a pair of gooey cheese melt sandwiches; hand-rolled meatballs stuffed inside Italian boules; seasonal unicorn cake fritters.

programme.sub-title: All-Day Brunch, Jerk Chicken and Cupcakes

programme.title: Food Truck Nation

programme.title: Food Paradise

programme.desc: From hot dogs and burgers to pizza and onion rings, even a dessert, these pepper popper creations are on fire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes hog-wild with fantastic porky delights made by amazing carnival cooks; whether it's grilled, smoked or even incorporated into dessert, it's time to pig out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: These fairground vendors have combined two iconic treats into one revolutionary new midway masterpiece.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Oklahoma for the Giant Texas Tenderloin Sandwich; tries Strawberry Pizza in Virginia.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits St. Louis and explores such edible icons as St. Louis-style BBQ, toasted ravioli, and gooey butter cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew explores the iconic eats of Lisbon, Portugal, where seafood reigns supreme, including sardines and shellfish feasts; late-night snacks are piled with pork, soups overflow with sausage and dessert is a religious experience, too.
